name: Surya Yantra (Sun Yantra)
description: Used when Sun position in Horoscope is weak (in 6, 8, 12 houses), or to bring glow on the face and vitality.
benefits: To get name and fame in society
To get respect in society
To have good relationship with Father
To get work done in social circle
To overcome immunity issues
To bring glow on face
mantras: Om Hraam Hreem Hraum Sah Suryay Namah:

preparation.materials: Bhojpatra or Plain paper with red pen/wooden pen of pomegranate tree, ashtagandha ink or red ink.

name: Chandra Yantra (Moon Yantra)
description: Used when Moon position in Horoscope is not good (in 6, 8, 12 houses) or when experiencing mood swings.
benefits: To overcome mood swings
To overcome depression
To have good relationship with Mother
To overcome unwanted fear and restore confidence
mantras: Om Shraam Shreem Shraum Sah: Chandray Namah:

preparation.materials: Bhojpatra or Plain paper. Once made, keep under new moon light.

name: Mangal Yantra (Mars Yantra)
description: Used when Mars position in Horoscope is not good. Excellent for building courage, strength, and resolving debts.
benefits: To gain self-confidence
To gain fighting spirit and get courage
To become debt-free
Helps those who have blood-related issues
Helps in finding a suitable match and fulfilling married life
mantras: Om Kram Kreem Kraum Sah: Bhaumay Namah:

preparation.materials: Bhojpatra or Plain paper with red ink.

name: Budh Yantra (Mercury Yantra)
description: Used when Mercury position in Horoscope is not good. Boosts intelligence, communication, and business.
benefits: Enhances Intelligence Quotient (IQ) and quick-wittedness
Improves learning abilities and creativity
Increases multitasking skills
Good for getting good grades in exams
Helps in communication, speaking, and resolving skin issues
Helps sales and marketing professionals achieve targets
mantras: Om Braam Breem Braum Sah: Budhay Namah:

preparation.materials: Bhojpatra or Plain paper with green/red ink.

name: Guru Yantra (Jupiter Yantra)
description: Used when Jupiter position is weak. Grants immense wisdom, prosperity, and spiritual growth.
benefits: Enhances knowledge and wisdom
Improves learning abilities and financial status
Best for career, profession, and business growth
Bestows good health and childbirth blessings
mantras: Om Graam Greem Graum Sah: Guruve Namah:

preparation.materials: Bhojpatra or Plain paper with kesar/saffron or yellow ink.

name: Shukra Yantra (Venus Yantra)
description: Used when Venus position is weak. Attracts love, luxury, fine arts, and happy relationships.
benefits: Helps in terms of love, spouse, and relationships
Attracts riches and luxuries of life
Creates positive energy and helps bring wealth and good fortune
Brings prosperity and improves marital life
mantras: Om Draam Dreem Draum Sah: Shukray Namah:

preparation.materials: Bhojpatra or Plain paper.

name: Shani Yantra (Saturn Yantra)
description: Used to pacify Saturn during transit, Sade Sati, or weak placement in horoscope.
benefits: Success in worldly affairs and business
Useful when one feels depressed or anxious
Used to please Lord Shani during Sade Sati or transits
Builds reputation and social honor
Enhances justice, correct judgment, courage, and physical strength
mantras: Om Praam Preem Praum Sah: Shanishcharay Namah

preparation.materials: Bhojpatra or Plain paper with dark blue/black or red ink.

name: Rahu Yantra
description: Negates the malefic effects of Rahu in the horoscope. Shields against accidents and negative habits.
benefits: Negates the malefic effects of Rahu
Blesses the native with knowledge, deep understanding, and respect
Acts as a shield against accidents and mishaps (especially if Rahu occupies the 8th house)
Helps individuals facing addiction problems
Protects from hidden enemies
mantras: Om Bhraam Bhreem Bhraum Sah: Rahve Namah:

preparation.materials: Bhojpatra or Plain paper. Can be used in combination with Hanuman Yantra.

name: Ketu Yantra
description: Used when Ketu position is weak. Reduces Guru Chandal Yog and Kaal Sarpa Dosh effects.
benefits: Brings success in business and rise in profession
Victory over enemies and all-round success
Beneficial during Ketu Dasha and sub-Dasha periods
Decreases malefic effects of Guru Chandal Yog and Kaal Sarpa Dosh
Good for health issues related to spine, knees, sensory systems, and wounds
Provides new career opportunities
mantras: Om Straam Streem Strom Sah: Ketave Namah:

preparation.materials: Bhojpatra or Plain paper.

name: Rog Niwarak Yantra
description: Used for getting relief from diseases as well as for overall good health.
benefits: Cures chronic and acute diseases
Brings overall good physical and mental health
Protects the body from seasonal ailments

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri, Gupt Navaratri, Akshay Tritiya
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha. Wear in red thread inside amulet.

name: House Protection Yantra
description: Very effective for protecting the house from all unwanted negative energies and obstacles.
benefits: Protects home from evil eye, ghosts, and negative vibrations
Releases obstacles from home growth
Establishes a shield of positivity

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri, Gupt Navaratri, Akshay Tritiya
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha. Frame it on the main door or place on red cloth.

layout.text2: NAME OF THE OWNER OF THE HOUSE

name: Vidya Prapti Yantra (Yantra to Gain Knowledge)
description: Specifically designed for students to increase memory, concentration, and get deeper knowledge.
benefits: Increases concentration and focus in studies
Improves memory retention
Helps gain deeper knowledge and understanding
mantras: Saraswati Namastubhyam Varade Kaama-Roopini Vidyaarambham Karishyaami Siddhir-Bhavatu Me Sadaa

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Silver color card paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of Kesar. Blow air on it after mantra recitation. Keep on study table.

name: Vyaapaar Vruddhi Yantra
description: Helps in enhancing business, attracting customer footfall, and bringing financial prosperity.
benefits: Brings financial prosperity and profits
Enhances sales and business growth
Clears career blocks and stagnation

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri, Sharad Purnima
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of Ashtagandha. Stick on wall of business or office.

name: Wish Manifestation Yantra (Sarva Iccha Purak Yantra)
description: Helps to manifest deep desires and fulfill goals. Invoke Lord Shiva for quick results.
benefits: Manifests noble desires and wishes
Clears paths of pending work and stagnation
Helps align focus with aspirations

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri, Shravan Mondays
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of Ashtagandha. Keep for 1 year, then emerge in water.

name: Yash Prapti Yantra (Yantra to Gain Glory)
description: Brings name, fame, glory, and helps in restoring lost opportunities and dignity in society.
benefits: Brings respect, name, and fame
Helps in getting back lost dignity and honor
Attracts lost career/business opportunities

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri, Gupt Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha. Wear in red thread inside amulet.

name: Yantra for Success in Exam
description: Helps students overcome examination phobia and stress, bringing intense focus.
benefits: Overcomes examination phobia and nervousness
Reduces stress during study hours
Brings focus and calm mindset

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink. Look at it before going for exams. Offer curd and sugar to the yantra.

name: Yantra for Success in Court Cases
description: Helps the native get quicker relief and favorable decisions from unwanted court litigation.
benefits: Brings positive developments in legal disputes
Saves from unwanted legal expenses
Gives mental strength during distress

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha. Wear in red thread inside amulet. Disperse in river after victory.

name: Sarva Peeda Nashak Yantra
description: Effective for all kinds of physical, mental, or emotional pain and suffering.
benefits: Relieves physical pain and ailments
Reduces emotional and mental suffering
Pacifies planetary imbalances in the horoscope
mantras: Budhi Heen Tanu Janike Sumiro Pawan Kumar Bal Budhi Vidya Dehu mohi Harahu Klesh Vikar
Nashe rog hare sab peeda japat nirantar hanumat beera !!

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha. Wear in red thread inside amulet.

name: Bad Dream Removal Yantra
description: Helps in getting rid of chronic bad dreams, nightmares, and sleep issues.
benefits: Removes nightmares and fear at night
Brings deep sleep and peace of mind
Excellent for young children prone to night frights

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink. Keep under the pillow at night.

name: Yatra Siddhi Yantra
description: Kept to ensure a safe journey and success in travels for urgent or important tasks.
benefits: Protects against accidents during travel
Ensures the purpose of the journey is successfully accomplished
Keeps the native safe in foreign places

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Emerge in flowing water after journey.

name: Yantra for Happiness and Prosperity
description: Brings harmony, wealth, and abundant joy. Good for home and business settings alike.
benefits: Brings peace, prosperity, and happiness
Harmonizes relationship conflicts at home
Boosts business revenue when kept at workplace
mantras: Om Hreem Shreem Tanno Devi Prachodayat

preparation.day: Any Tuesday or Friday of Shukla Paksh
preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink. Offer Ghee diya and incense sticks daily.

name: Yantra for Good Luck
description: Attracts fortune, fills desires, and assists in foreign settlements and travels.
benefits: Fulfills positive desires and brings opportunities
Attracts fortune and good luck in risky ventures
Helps in traveling or settling in foreign states

preparation.day: Any Tuesday or Friday of Shukla Paksh
preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink.

name: Yantra for Name and Fame
description: Helps in obtaining public recognition, honor, fame, and expanding your social circle.
benefits: Attracts social name and fame
Improves image and standing in society
Expands professional and social network

preparation.day: Any Tuesday or Friday of Shukla Paksh
preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of Ashtagandha.

name: Yantra for Happiness at Home
description: Brings supreme peace, happiness, and a positive environment to the household. Keep in East direction.
benefits: Establishes a peaceful domestic atmosphere
Reduces arguments and tension between family members
Protects family from external negative vibes
mantras: Chant names of Lord Shiva, Ishta Devta, and Kuldevi

preparation.day: Any Tuesday or Friday of Shukla Paksh
preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Keep in east facing direction.

name: Yantra for Money
description: Mainly used for resolving monetary issues and fulfilling money-related desires.
benefits: Helps in resolving outstanding loans and debt
Opens up stagnant income channels
Brings blessings of Goddess Lakshmi

preparation.day: Any Tuesday or Friday of Shukla Paksh
preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Meditate on Mata Lakshmi.

name: Yantra for Increase Money
description: Used for gaining abundance of money, food grains, and wealth. Keep in safe/cash box (Tijori).
benefits: Increases savings and cash reserves
Brings abundance of food grains and materials in the house
Improves business turnover

preparation.day: Any Tuesday or Friday of Shukla Paksh
preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink. Keep in Cash box, Vault, or Safe (Tijori).

name: Yantra for Removing Nazar Dosh
description: Helps in curing sudden health drop and negative blockages caused by evil eye or nazar.
benefits: Removes nazar dosh from children and adults
Cures sudden physical ailments where medicine fails
Restores positive energy flow

preparation.day: Any Tuesday or Friday of Shukla Paksh
preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Invoke Hanumanji.

name: Yantra for Removing Evil Eye
description: Used when an adult suffers severely in health due to evil eye effects. Do not confuse with Nazar Dosh.
benefits: Strong protective layer for adults
Restores deteriorating health
Washes off negative envy vibrations

preparation.day: Any Tuesday or Friday of Shukla Paksh
preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Wear in red thread inside amulet.

name: Hanuman Yantra
description: Helps in removing severe negative energy, fear of evil spirits, and phobia of darkness.
benefits: Restores lost courage, willpower, and confidence
Gives high positive energy to complete complex tasks
Excellent protector against paranormal fear or nightmares

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Write in Devnagri script if possible.

name: Yantra for Marriage
description: Helps individuals whose marriage is getting delayed due to planetary obstacles.
benefits: Removes blockages delaying holy matrimony
Helps find a compatible and loving partner
Girls should prepare on Tuesday, boys on Friday

preparation.time: Diwali Night, Holi Night, Eclipses, Navaratri, Mahashivratri, Shiva Ratri
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Meditate on Lord Shiva & Goddess Parvati.

name: Yantra for Successful Marriage
description: Kept by recently married couples to keep husband-wife relations in happy tandem and understanding.
benefits: Reduces friction between newly-weds
Enhances emotional and mental bonding
Establishes lifelong mutual respect

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink. Meditate on Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati.

name: Dhanwantri Yantra
description: Lord Dhanwantari is the lord of Ayurveda. Keep near a sick person or in a medicine box.
benefits: Improves the efficacy of medicines
Speeds up recovery from critical sickness
Kept on North wall of patient's room for long-term health benefits

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Meditate on Dhanvantari Dev.

name: Yantra to Remove Pain
description: Used to remove or overcome muscular and joints pain. Can be used to charge drinking water.
benefits: Reduces muscular pain and inflammation
Charge water by keeping a glass of water on it for 10 mins, then consume it

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Chant Hanuman Chalisa while preparing.

name: Dhan Prapti Yantra
description: Earn money in abundance through hard work. Do not use for gambling, casino, or lottery.
benefits: Brings monetary abundance and professional rewards
Fills hard work and efforts with success
Sit facing North East or North while preparing

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ashtagandha.

name: Shiv Panchakshar Yantra
description: Grants blessings of Lord Shiva. Overcomes fear of death, helps in salvation, and brings self-discipline.
benefits: Bestows divine protection of Lord Shiva
Brings extreme self-discipline and focus on spiritual journey
Overcomes fear of sudden death or calamity

preparation.day: Any day (highly auspicious on Shravan month Mondays)
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen.

name: Shree Ganesh Yantra for Studies
description: Used by students to get good marks, overcome fear of competition, and improve academic scores.
benefits: Helps students score well in examinations
Overcomes fear of intense competition
Removes educational obstacles. Keep on study table.

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha.

name: Mata Durga Yantra
description: Used to fulfill incomplete or pending work, remove obstacles in career/job, and stop unwanted thoughts.
benefits: Finishes stalled or incomplete projects
Overcomes fear of negative or intrusive thoughts
Removes professional and business blocks

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Give sweets/donations to small girls.

name: Vishnu Yantra
description: Used to remove deep obstacles in one's married life or professional job life. Keep in temple.
benefits: Resolves long-term marital discord
Clears career blocks and brings stability
Offer yellow flowers and sprinkle turmeric powder on the yantra

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Sprinkle turmeric powder after lamination.

name: Nav Grah Shanti Yantra
description: Used to pacify the ill effects of all 9 planetary positions in the horoscope. Keep in temple, drawer, or pocket.
benefits: Pacifies negative placements of all 9 planets
Attracts general luck and positivity
Can be kept in pocket, temple, or office drawer

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Offer Ghee diya and incense.

name: Shree Ram Yantra
description: Brings clarity of thoughts, self-esteem, and willpower. Promotes inner goodness and removes vices.
benefits: Brings immense clarity of thoughts
Enhances self-esteem and willpower
Relieves the native from vices and negative habits

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha.

name: Kuber Yantra
description: Attracts massive wealth, opportunities, and abundance of money and food grains. Keep in North direction.
benefits: Brings a bundle of wealth opportunities
Ensures abundance of money and food in the home
Should be kept in the North direction of the house/office

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha.

name: Saraswati Yantra
description: Ideal for students and professionals in arts, music, and academics. Promotes peace of mind.
benefits: Brings required peace of mind to pursue education
Highly recommended for musicians, painters, and actors
Can be used alongside Shree Ganesh Yantra for exams

preparation.day: Any Day (Vasant Panchami is highly preferred)
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Offer white flowers during puja.

name: Sarva Manokamna Yantra
description: Helps in fulfilling desires. Works extremely well when desiring for someone else's benefit/well-being.
benefits: Fulfills sincere desires
Works wonders when praying/manifesting for others
Brings peace of mind and success

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha.

name: Sankat Mochan Yantra
description: Used only when no other solution is visible to escape severe life problems. Note: Do not use with Hanuman Yantra.
benefits: Ultimate savior during major life crisis
Dissolves heavy karmic blocks
Gives strength to fight obstacles

preparation.day: Shukla Paksh Tuesday or any Saturday
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink. Offer red sweets to Hanumanji.

name: Jyotirling Yantra
description: Blessings of Mahadev and all 12 Jyotirlingas. Removes deep-seated phobias and high fever.
benefits: Brings blessings of all 12 Jyotirling temples
Removes phobias, fears, and cures persistent high fever
Promotes deep spiritual realization and soul peace

preparation.time: Shivratri, Trayodashi, Eclipse, or Shravan Month Mondays
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Meditate on Shiva.

name: Yantra for Mental Peace
description: Brings absolute peace of mind, controls high temper, and eases mood swings. Equal to wearing pearl gemstone.
benefits: Calms down high anger and short temper issues
Eases mood swings and anxiety
Makes the mind strong and focused. Keep on North wall.

preparation.time: Shivratri, or after Chandra Darshan (2nd day after New Moon)
preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Offer white flower during puja.

name: Gauri Shankar Yantra
description: Blessings of Shiva & Shakti. Strengthens marriage relationship, cures infertility, and sexual dysfunctions.
benefits: Keeps husband-wife relation in deep harmony
Strengthens family peace, security, and comfort
Cures infertility and sexual dysfunctions. Do abhishek of Shivling on Mondays.

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen.

name: Gayatri Yantra
description: Improves concentration in any field, removes bodily toxins, and relieves stress/anxiety.
benefits: Improves concentration and memory
Helps in breathing issues and detoxifying body
Eases stress, anxiety, and develops spiritual path

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Chant Gayatri Mantra.

name: Yantra to Get Rid of Diseases - Pregnancy
description: Cures physical diseases during pregnancy. Highly recommended for women with a history of past miscarriages.
benefits: Cures diseases and protects health during pregnancy
Protects the fetus and avoids miscarriages
Chant Ram Naam or Durga name during preparation

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Offer Ghee diya and incense.

name: Yantra for Attainment of Occult Powers
description: Helps in attainment of high spiritual/occult powers in a pure way. Note: Must not be used for black magic.
benefits: Assists in occult and spiritual research
Enhances intuition and premonition abilities
Chant name of Ishta Devta or Kuldevi

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha.

name: Vahan Prapti Yantra
description: Fulfills the desire of purchasing or getting a vehicle for personal use.
benefits: Assists in acquiring a personal vehicle
Protects the native's vehicle from accidents/theft
Chant OM NAMAH SHIVAY 5001 times with yantra in hand

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen.

name: Rog Nashak Yantra
description: Used in curing small diseases like fever, cold, flu, etc. when suffering for more than 6 days.
benefits: Cures minor but persistent fever, cold, or flu
Can do water charging (keep glass of water on yantra and drink it)
Prepare during evening time after sunset

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen.

name: Ganesh Yantra (Blessings)
description: Used to get all-round blessings of Lord Ganesha, granting success in all walks of life.
benefits: Grants overall success and happiness
Removes minor obstacles and delays
Offer red flowers, Modaks, or Laddoos to the Yantra
mantras: OM EKDANTAAY VIDMAHE, VAKRA TUNDAAY DHIMAHI, TANNO DANTIH PRACHODAYAT

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen. Recite Ganesh Gayatri.

name: Shatru Nashak Yantra
description: Used to get rid of enemies, weaken their negative influence, and gain extra strength to face them.
benefits: Protects from court and personal enemies
Makes the enemy's plans weak and ineffective
Chant Hanuman Chalisa during preparation

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen.

name: Success Yantra
description: Comprehensive success yantra for all walks of life. Used to secure jobs and professional promotions.
benefits: Secures professional jobs and promotions
Acts as a powerful complement to other specific success yantras
Chant Hanuman Chalisa during preparation

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen.

name: Success Karya Yantra
description: Ensures your desires are done and assists in convincing clients or conveying thoughts to others.
benefits: Ensures client conversions and commercial success
Helps convince others of your thoughts and arguments
Brings peace and fulfills desires

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen with ink of ashtagandha.

name: Work and Business Increase Yantra for Income
description: Used when business is experiencing losses for continuous 6 months. Combines with Vyapaar Vruddhi.
benefits: Saves business from long-term financial loss
Brings success in newly initiated commercial projects
Attracts higher customer ticket size and cash inflow

preparation.materials: ON Bhojpatra OR Plain paper with red ink or pomegranate twig pen.
